final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing abstract expressionist artwork suitable for display in a modern art gallery (all in-image text in Chinese).

Style/medium: needs an 抽象表现主义 aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a dynamic, non-figurative composition filled with emotional energy — exact framing and gesture direction are yours
Subject: must include no concrete figures or recognizable forms — pure abstraction only
Scene/backdrop: 
Lighting/mood: needs a mood of intense emotion and raw energy — exact atmospheric treatment is yours
Color palette: needs bold, clashing color collisions — exact hues, ratios, and contrasts are yours
Materials/textures: needs a fluid, gestural brushwork surface — exact stroke weight, layering, and paint texture are yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: must include all in-image text in Chinese by default; must contain no representational imagery — abstract only
Avoid: must avoid any concrete figures, recognizable objects, or literal narrative imagery
